judgment.summary: High-growth cloud data company with strong revenue and FCF, but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis and trading at a high forward multiple.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates; next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 30.1% YoY — demonstrating strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow $1.59B TTM — positive cash generation supports operations.
Forward P/E 67.25x — while high, it reflects significant expected future growth.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $229.66, suggesting upside potential.
Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 17.8%.
negatives: Operating margin -33.2% and Profit margin -28.4% — the company is not yet GAAP profitable.
Return on equity -53.9% and Return on assets -9.9% — negative returns indicate current unprofitability.
Debt/Equity ratio 142.46 — leverage is substantial, though offset by cash.
Price/Sales 12.06x — a high multiple that implies high growth expectations.

news.paragraph: Snowflake's stock is seeing positive analyst commentary ahead of its Q1 earnings report, with RBC Capital highlighting strong checks and increasing adoption of its Cortex AI code. This comes as the company is set to report earnings on May 27th, a key catalyst for the name. Traders should monitor commentary around AI adoption and forward guidance for any potential shifts in sentiment.

headlines.title: Uncover the Charm of La Crosse, Wisconsin: A Perfect Retirement Spot with Scenic Views
Snowflake (SNOW)’s Q1 Upside Likely Given Strong Checks And Ramping Cortex Code Adoption, Says RBC Capital
